name: US National Credit Solutions
description_short: Debt settlement company founded in 2007 that consolidates credit card and consumer debt into single payments, targeting 40%+ reductions without bankruptcy.
description_long:
US National Credit Solutions was established in 2007 and is headquartered in New York City, with operations based in Miami, Florida. The company was founded with the explicit goal of providing cost-effective alternatives to bankruptcy for consumers struggling with multiple debt obligations. They serve consumers nationwide and in Puerto Rico.

The company offers debt consolidation and settlement services across multiple debt types including credit card debt, personal loans, store credit cards, medical bills, credit lines, and repossessed auto loans. Their core service consolidates all client debts into a single monthly payment while negotiating with creditors to reduce principal balances. They claim typical reductions of 40% or more and eliminate interest fees as part of their program structure. The company provides free initial consultations with no obligation to enroll.

US National Credit Solutions distinguishes itself through claimed FTC compliance and transparency, staff certification by the International Association of Professional Debt Arbitrators (IAPDA), and membership in both the Manhattan Chamber of Commerce and New York Hispanic Chamber of Commerce. The company emphasizes a personalized approach with more than 15 years of combined industry experience among their specialists. They offer multilingual support (Spanish language services available) and maintain a client login portal for account management.

Prospective clients should note that debt settlement inherently involves negotiated reductions of principal debt, which typically carries credit report implications during the settlement process. The company positions itself against bankruptcy specifically, though no licensing or regulatory oversight details beyond FTC guidance are provided on their website. The 40% reduction claim is presented as typical but not guaranteed, and individual results would vary based on specific debt amounts and creditor negotiations.
address: 633 W 5th St 26 Floor, Los Angeles, CA 90071

company_info.headquarters: 633 W 5th St 26 Floor, Los Angeles, CA 90071

pros: Established 15+ years with team expertise in financial industry and debt resolution
Staff certified by International Association of Professional Debt Arbitrators (IAPDA)
Claims 40% or more debt reduction on principal balances with interest fee elimination
Consolidates multiple debts into single monthly payment for simplified management
Free consultations with no obligation to enroll in their program
Member of Manhattan Chamber of Commerce and New York Hispanic Chamber of Commerce
Operates nationwide plus Puerto Rico with multilingual support (Spanish available)
cons: Debt settlement typically negatively impacts credit scores during negotiation period, not discussed in detail
40% reduction figure presented as 'typical' without explanation of variation or guarantees
Limited transparency on actual fees charged for their consolidation and settlement services
No independent verification of IAPDA certification or FTC compliance status provided
Website lacks specifics on timeline, creditor success rates, or detailed program structure
best_for: Consumers with $5K-$100K+ in credit card and unsecured debt seeking alternatives to bankruptcy
People making minimum payments monthly without reducing principal balances
Those receiving creditor collection calls and facing financial hardship
Bilingual consumers (Spanish/English) seeking personalized debt negotiation assistance
diagnosis: Best for consumers with $5K+ in high-interest credit card and unsecured debt who want to avoid bankruptcy and consolidate into manageable payments. Primary caveat: debt settlement reduces credit scores during the negotiation process (typically 6-36 months), and the advertised 40% reduction is described as 'typical' without clear guarantees or fee transparency on the website.
services: Debt consolidation combining multiple debts into single payment
Credit card debt settlement and reduction
Client account portal login and management
